summary: Completed testing of Betfair-style cricket betting exchange features. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verified working correctly with 3-level order book, bookmaker sections, bet slip, exposure display, and recharge history page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Betfair-style exchange features verified. Key findings: (1) 3-level Back/Lay order book working with correct display order (Back: 3rd, 2nd, Best | Lay: Best, 2nd, 3rd), (2) Bookmaker sections display Indian rate format (e.g., 105, 107 instead of 2.05, 2.07), (3) User exposure (profit/loss per team) displayed correctly on match page, (4) MATCHED BET tab shows user's bets for the match, (5) Bet slip with profit/loss calculation working, (6) Recharge History page at /user/recharges working, (7) User sidebar has all required links (Betting History, Recharge History, Withdrawal History).

match_detail_order_book.details: 3-level Back/Lay order book returned with home_back_levels, home_lay_levels, away_back_levels, away_lay_levels

order_book_liquidity_sizes.details: Liquidity sizes included in order book (home_back_sizes, home_lay_sizes, etc.)

bookmaker_indian_rate_format.details: Bookmaker odds in Indian rate format (e.g., 105, 76 instead of 2.05, 1.76)

my_bets_endpoint.details: GET /api/match/{match_id}/my-bets returns user's bets for the match

bet_placement.details: POST /api/bets places bet and deducts from wallet

frontend_3_level_order_book.details: Desktop shows 6 cells per team (3 Back + 3 Lay), mobile shows 2 cells (best Back + best Lay)

frontend_bookmaker_section.details: Bookmaker section displays with Indian rate format and min/max bet limits

frontend_odds_matched_tabs.details: ODDS | MATCHED BET tabs work correctly, MATCHED BET shows user's bets

frontend_bet_slip.details: Clicking odds cells adds to bet slip, shows profit/loss calculation

frontend_exposure_display.details: User exposure (P&L per team) displayed under team names

recharge_history_page.details: /user/recharges route loads Recharge History page with deposit transactions

user_sidebar_menu.details: Sidebar has Betting History, Recharge History, Withdrawal History links

mocked_apis.note: Bookmaker section Indian rates are derived from Odds API decimal odds. Liquidity amounts are simulated.

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/bet_slip_logged_in.png - Bet slip with selection and profit/loss calculation
.screenshots/matched_bets_logged_in.png - MATCHED BET tab showing user's bets
.screenshots/recharge_history_logged_in.png - Recharge History page with deposit transactions
